scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && npm run postbuild
scripts.build:prod: cp .env.build .env.production.local && tsc -b && vite build --mode production && npm run postbuild
scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const src='dist',dst='../public/spa';function rm(d){if(fs.existsSync(d))for(const f of fs.readdirSync(d)){const fp=p.join(d,f);if(f==='.htaccess')continue;if(fs.statSync(fp).isDirectory()){rm(fp);fs.rmdirSync(fp);}else fs.unlinkSync(fp);}}function cp(s,d){if(!fs.existsSync(d))fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const sp=p.join(s,f),dp=p.join(d,f);if(fs.statSync(sp).isDirectory())cp(sp,dp);else fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp);}}rm(dst);cp(src,dst);console.log('Synced dist -> public/spa');"
